ANXA1 is a marker of cells undergoing inflammation17 is expressed highly in TGFBI-high epithelial cells (Supplementary Fig. 3e), while ELF3 is expressed in differentiating corneal epithelial cells.

They were subdivided into fibroblasts, MEG3-high fibroblasts, MGP-high fibroblasts, WIF1-high fibroblasts and Ribosomal genes high fibroblasts.

Iris stroma is also populated by Schwann cells that help myelination of axons of neuronal cell types that populate iris. They expressed CD9 marker, which is implicated in the signalling of Schwann cells with axon
CBCs were subdivided into CBCs, COL9A1- high CBCs, CRYAA-high CBCs and pigmented CBCs
CBCs were subdivided into CBCs, COL9A1- high CBCs, CRYAA-high CBCs and pigmented CBCs

Smooth muscle cells (SMCs) that populate sphincter pupillae and dilator pupillae muscles were detected in the data (Fig. 3c). They had high MYH11 and MYL9 (Supplementary Fig. 3f) expression, which are the canonical markers for SMCs

Smooth muscle cells (SMCs) that populate sphincter pupillae and dilator pupillae muscles were detected in the data (Fig. 3c). They had high MYH11 and MYL9 (Supplementary Fig. 3f) expression, which are the canonical markers for SMCs
A pigmented layer of epithelial cells also populates the iris. They expressed canonical markers involved in  pigmentation like MLANA and PMEL
A pigmented layer of epithelial cells also populates the iris. They expressed canonical markers involved in  pigmentation like MLANA and PMEL

Besides putative stem cells, two subpopulations of CBCs, COL9A1 high CBCs and pigmented CBCs showed higher similarity to such putative stem cells. All three cell types expressed of PAX6 and SIX3, eye field TFs (EFTF).

Besides putative stem cells, two subpopulations of CBCs, COL9A1 high CBCs and pigmented CBCs showed higher similarity to such putative stem cells. All three cell types expressed of PAX6 and SIX3, eye field TFs (EFTF).

Besides putative stem cells, two subpopulations of CBCs, COL9A1 high CBCs and pigmented CBCs showed higher similarity to such putative stem cells. All three cell types expressed of PAX6 and SIX3, eye field TFs (EFTF).
Putative stem cells have an expression of OTX2, which is another EFTFs
COL9A1 high CBCs expressed CPAMD8 (Supplementary Fig. 3f), which plays a role in periocular mesenchyme development
